dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: Optional. Bind one or more business dimensions so the assistant can explain answers in the context of selected categories or filtered report slices.

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: Optional. Bind one or more measures so the assistant can summarize totals, compare selected values, and ground answers in visible metrics.

host.description: Enter the full Databricks workspace URL for your environment, for example an AWS host like https://dbc-xxxx.cloud.databricks.com or an Azure host like https://adb-<workspace>.<region>.azuredatabricks.net.

apiBaseUrl.description: Recommended for production. Use the shared PulsePlay proxy instead of direct browser-to-Databricks calls, for example http://localhost:8787 or https://proxy.company.com.

assistantProfile.description: Optional. Name of the assistant profile configured in the shared PulsePlay proxy. Leave blank to use the default profile.

proxyKey.description: Optional. Sent as the PulsePlay proxy shared-key header when your proxy requires API-key authentication. Leave blank for local or IdP-only proxies.

token.description: Use a Databricks PAT for direct mode. Leave this blank when a proxy or gateway handles authentication server-side.

spaceId.description: Paste the Genie room or space identifier used by this report.

genieFields.displayName: Optional - Approved Genie Fields For Validation
genieFields.description: Optional. Paste approved Genie metric-view field names, one per line or comma-separated, so the visual can validate that the Power BI fields bound to the visual exist in Genie.

domainGuidance.description: Optional. Add business rules or KPI interpretation guidance that should be included with every question.

darkMode.description: Switch the visual between dark and light presentation modes for report readability.

showSql.description: Turn on only for analyst or developer review when you want to inspect the SQL returned with a Genie answer.

devMode.displayName: Developer Mode - Show Setup And Reasoning Tools
devMode.description: Turns on the builder-oriented panel with setup guidance, context diagnostics, and orchestration details for testing and troubleshooting.
